name: Evergreendirect
description_short: evergreenDIRECT is a credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with rewards-based accounts and competitive rates to its members.
description_long: evergreenDIRECT Credit Union is a not-for-profit financial cooperative serving members through a network of branches and shared branching locations. As a credit union, it operates under the principle of "people helping people," returning profits to members rather than shareholders. The organization offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including multiple checking and savings account options, personal and auto loans, home financing, student loan refinancing, and credit cards. The credit union's product lineup emphasizes rewards and incentives. Its checking accounts include Kasasa Cash (4.00% APY), Kasasa Cash Back (2.50% cash back), Kasasa Play (up to $10 in streaming service refunds), and Kasasa Eats (5.00% cash back on food purchases). Savings options range from standard savings accounts to money market accounts, IRAs, and share certificates (CDs). Loan products span personal loans, auto loans (including first-time buyer programs), boat and RV loans, home mortgages, home equity loans and lines of credit, and private student loan refinancing. The Perks Visa Credit Card offers rates as low as 10.25% APR with no balance transfer fees and cash back rewards. Key differentiators include the credit union structure itself, which emphasizes member ownership and lower fees compared to traditional banks. The organization offers accessibility features, financial education through ZOGO, hardship assistance programs, and community scholarships. Digital services include online and mobile banking, mobile deposits, wire transfers, and surcharge-free ATM access through shared branching networks. Limitations include membership requirements and potential geographic constraints, as credit unions typically serve defined membership communities. The website does not clearly disclose specific eligibility requirements, membership fees (if any), or the geographic area served. Loan terms, interest rates, and approval criteria are not detailed on the public website.
services: Kasasa Cash Checking (4.00% APY rewards checking)
Kasasa Cash Back Checking (2.50% cash back)
Kasasa Eats Checking (5.00% cash back on food)
Home mortgages, home equity loans, and HELOCs
Perks Visa Credit Card (as low as 10.25% APR)
Mobile banking and online bill pay
Shared branching and surcharge-free ATM access
pros: Multiple rewards checking options with high APY rates (4.00% on Kasasa Cash, 5.00% cash back on Kasasa Eats)
Comprehensive loan portfolio including auto, personal, home, student loan refinance, and specialized programs like first-time car buyer and high LTV home loans
No balance transfer fees on Perks Visa Credit Card with rates starting at 10.25% APR
Credit union structure returns profits to members as owners, not shareholders
Loan refinancing promotion offering up to 50% off interest rates on existing debt
Digital banking suite with mobile app, online bill pay, mobile deposits, and surcharge-free ATM access
Community-focused programs including scholarships, financial education (ZOGO), and hardship assistance
cons: Membership requirements may exclude some consumers; eligibility criteria not clearly disclosed
Website does not provide specific interest rates, APRs, or loan terms for most products, requiring direct contact
Limited transparency on fees, minimum balances, account maintenance costs, and membership costs
Geographic service area not clearly defined; may not serve all locations
No information provided about insurance protections, account guarantees, or regulatory charter details
best_for: Credit union members or those eligible to join seeking rewards-based checking with high dividends
Consumers looking to refinance existing auto loans or credit cards at reduced rates
Homeowners seeking home equity loans or lines of credit using accumulated home equity
diagnosis: evergreenDIRECT is best for existing or eligible credit union members seeking competitive rates, rewards-based accounts, and comprehensive lending solutions. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements and specific terms are not disclosed online, requiring direct contact; additionally, the public website lacks detailed rate and fee transparency needed for full comparison shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Evergreendirect — Credit Union in Tumwater, WA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Evergreendirect — NCUA-insured credit union in Tumwater, WA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
